hero.title: Your Health, Our Priority
hero.subtitle: Expert medical care with a personal touch. Book your appointment today and experience healthcare reimagined.

about.title: About Dr. Sarah Mitchell
about.subtitle: Meet Your Doctor
about.description: With over 15 years of experience in internal medicine, I am dedicated to providing comprehensive, patient-centered care. My approach combines the latest medical advances with compassionate, personalized attention to help you achieve optimal health.
about.philosophyText: I believe in treating the whole person, not just symptoms. Every patient deserves to be heard, understood, and actively involved in their healthcare decisions.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive Healthcare Solutions
services.description: We offer a wide range of medical services to meet your healthcare needs.
services.generalCheckupDesc: Comprehensive health assessments to monitor and maintain your well-being.
services.chronicCareDesc: Ongoing care and support for managing chronic conditions effectively.
services.preventiveDesc: Proactive health screenings and vaccinations to prevent illness.
services.consultationDesc: Expert medical advice for your health concerns and questions.
services.labTestsDesc: Comprehensive diagnostic testing for accurate health assessments.
services.followUpDesc: Continuous monitoring and care after treatments or procedures.
